column3: Run Cancellation Wizard to submit cancellation request for Part PO

column3: Run the WIMS wizard against an item on the original PO utilizing the following Wizard Path: Select Eligible Item Indicate if CT has received item: Select Yes or No as applicable Select Reason of Customer Contact: Notified of a delay/issue Select Issue Diagnosis: Damaged In Transit Continue Select Resolution: Replace the item with a brand-new one Confirm Shipping Address: Use same address as original shipment Continue Submit Resolution
Respond to the supplier utilizing the Replacement Part Fulfill with Full Unit template and close the ticket under a Done resolution.
